good: Lesson: always pin dependency versions in pyproject.toml and the lockfile to avoid surprise transitive bumps breaking CI.
bad: Reminder from the postmortem: always pin dependency versions in pyproject.toml and the lockfile, because an unpinned transitive bump silently broke the CI build last Tuesday and cost us three hours of debugging — also note the cafeteria menu changed and parking lot B is closed, lorem-ipsum-noise
